privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated specification document in setup_task.sh. The expected wait time (~44.8 hours) and delta-v (~48.4 m/s) are correctly bounded by the provided tolerance intervals (40-50 hours, 45-55 m/s) based on standard two-body Hohmann transfer mechanics. The output paths and tolerance constraints are strictly defined in export_result.sh and verifier.py.
